# Security.InputBounds constructor

Resource bounds a receiver imposes while validating peer inputs (spec §28.10, R-28.10-k, R-28.10-l).

```csharp
public InputBounds(int MaxSchemaDepth, int MaxPayloadBytes)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| MaxSchemaDepth | Maximum schema nesting depth; deeper schemas are rejected (R-28.10-k). |
| MaxPayloadBytes | Maximum serialized payload size in bytes; larger inputs are rejected (R-28.10-l). |
